structured.heightNote: 6 foot 4 (tall); Michael Daigler is 5 foot 4. A full foot taller. Honor this in any two-shot with Michael.

prose.voice: warm, easygoing, steady; the taller, clean-cut cofounder
prose.lore: Jake O'Shea, Michael's cofounder at AITX. Tall (6 foot 4), athletic, short dark-brown hair, a short well-groomed beard, warm friendly presence.
prose.rules: Real person: likeness from his photo stack, never invented. Any property featuring him stays GATED until he blesses words + art. Reads a full foot taller than Michael in two-shots.
